args.query: SELECT gmap_id, name, hours FROM business_description WHERE state = 'open' AND hours IS NOT NULL;

args.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN state='open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open_n, SUM(CASE WHEN hours IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hours_n FROM business_description;

exec_args.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(CASE WHEN state='open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS open_n, SUM(CASE WHEN hours IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hours_n FROM business_description;
